results.title: AI Native Daily Paper Digest – 20260612
results.content:
🛠️ Research Methods:

– HarnessBridge is introduced, a lightweight learnable harness controller that parameterizes agent-environment interfaces through two bidirectional projections: observation projection and action projection. Training is performed using a harness supervision dataset via unified instruction tuning.

💬 Research Conclusions:

– HarnessBridge matches or surpasses existing specialized harnesses in performance while significantly reducing computational overhead and effectively generalizing from smaller generators to larger commercial models.

👉 Paper link: 

### 36. High-Fidelity Two-Step Image Generation via Teacher-Aligned End-to-End Distillation [...] 💬 Research Conclusions:

– Visual Para-Thinker++ consistently outperforms existing baselines on hallucination-sensitive visual reasoning tasks across multiple benchmarks.

👉 Paper link: 

### 35. HarnessBridge: Learnable Bidirectional Controller for LLM Agent Harness

🔑 Keywords: HarnessBridge, learnable harness controller, bidirectional projection, long-horizon tasks

💡 Category: Reinforcement Learning

🌟 Research Objective:

– To investigate if a harness can be generated by a learnable plug-in module trained in an end-to-end fashion, specifically for enhancing agent-environment interactions.

🛠️ Research Methods: [...] – Released the kernel as an open-source project for further application and development.

👉 Paper link: 

### 21. A Stationary (and Therefore Compatible) Representation is All You Need

🔑 Keywords: stationary representations, d-Simplex fixed classifiers, compatibility, cross-entropy loss, contrastive loss

💡 Category: Machine Learning

🌟 Research Objective:

– The primary goal is to demonstrate the benefits of learning stationary representations through d-Simplex fixed classifiers to ensure model compatibility during sequential fine-tuning and updates.

🛠️ Research Methods:

results.title: 换接口空间推理+11分 • Buttondown
results.content:
也值得关注

 自主科研的瓶颈不在agent工作流，而在agent环境的设计 — EurekAgent把可优化指标和执行环境当作主战场，和近期环境工程话题呼应。
 世界动作模型的杠杆不在视觉重建保真度，而在语义化的视觉-动作tokenizer — RepWAM要让这层表示连接起未来预测与机器人控制。
 把agent harness从手工工程换成可训练插件 — HarnessBridge让接入环境的那层中介随任务一起优化。
 从单张窄视角图实时构建可漫游的环绕世界 — MoVerse把「世界构建」与「观测渲染」分离开。
 让隐状态递归式的潜在思维链变得可切换、能用on-policy RL优化 — 缓解latent CoT难优化、难解释的老问题。
 训练后量化把LLM压到三值权重加低比特激活 — TWLA面向部署的极致压缩。
 扩散模型的步级缓存不再靠阈值启发式 — 直接面向最终输出质量做预算约束下的缓存决策。
 补上CLIP类模型的「词袋式」理解缺陷 — 用跨模态掩码组合概念建模找回对象关系与属性绑定。
 DoorDash实战：多智能体RL从延迟的市场反馈里学三方派单的目标权重调整 — 难得的生产系统案例。
 零信息源约束下检测幻觉 — 不看模型内部、不依赖外部参考，靠类人判据探针。

阅读完整版 →

Don't miss what's next. Subscribe to AI论文简报:

Powered by Buttondown, the easiest way to start and grow your newsletter. [...] # AI论文简报

June 13, 2026 

# 换接口空间推理+11分

 接口设计决定空间推理上限。SpatialClaw不换模型、不微调，只把agent调用工具的动作接口改成有状态的代码内核，20个benchmark平均准确率59.9%，比近期空间agent高11.2分，且在六个VLM底座上一致提升。

 科学自动化的最后一公里：LabVLA把视觉-语言-动作模型接进真实实验台，用仿真数据引擎补齐实验室数据稀缺，在LabUtopia上分布内外场景都拿了第一。

 数学证明拆成生成-验证-修复三种能力来训，再用群体级test-time scaling组织起来，IMO 2025拿35/42、USAMO 2026拿36/42，双双过了人类金牌线。

 图像模型补上「交错生成」缺口——InterleaveThinker用外挂式多智能体pipeline加单步RL，让任意生成器能一边想一边交替产出图文，水平追平Nano Banana和GPT-5。

 2D监督足以撬动3D生成，VideoMDM完全不用3D真值，只靠单目视频里的精确2D姿态就训出连贯的3D人体运动先验，HumanML3D上几乎追平用全套3D数据训练的MDM。

也值得关注

 EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents – adapts prompting strategies during deployment using experience gathered from previous runs.

网络近日疯传一段工厂工业意外监控视频，画面显示一名工人在操作大型机械设备时，不幸被卷入运转中的主轴并高速旋转，场面骇人。  
  
经查证，这起一般机械伤害事故是于1月26日傍晚6时10分许发生，涉事地点为位于奉化区莼湖街道滨海新区的“百琪达智能科技（宁波）股份有限公司”2号车间。  
  
中国浙江省宁波市奉化区应急管理局早前已发布官方事故调查报告证实，涉事操作工已不幸伤重身亡，涉事企业也因安全防护漏洞，被勒令承担逾百万令吉的经济损失。

results.title: gajae-code/docs/telegram-remote.md at main · Yeachan-Heo/gajae-code · GitHub
results.content:
`gjc_coordinator_list_sessions`
`/sessions`
`gjc_coordinator_start_session`
`GJC_COORDINATOR_MCP_WORKDIR_ROOTS`
`GJC_COORDINATOR_MCP_SESSION_COMMAND`
`allow_mutation: true`

The web "steering wheel" remote (`docs/gajae-remote.md`, issue
#565) chose the harness control plane + bridge because it needs live
`Observation`/`readyForSubmit` submit gating for a one-line submit surface.
Telegram Remote v0 has no submit surface — only lifecycle and observation —
so it does not need the harness/bridge path. The two roadmaps stay independent;
a future Telegram backend adapter could front the harness control plane behind
the same four commands without changing this contract.

`docs/gajae-remote.md`
`Observation`
`readyForSubmit`

## Authority boundary contract [...] `gjc`
`workdir`
`sessionCommand`
`taskTemplate`
`{{task}}`
`/stop`
`cancelled`

## Implementation plan (PR-sized steps)

Each step is independently shippable; later steps stay fail-closed until wired.

`docs/telegram-remote.md`
`id`
`workdir`
`sessionCommand`
`taskTemplate?`
`taskMaxLen`
`coordinator status → chat summary/view`
`/sessions`
`/observe`
`/start-session <presetId> [task]`
`gjc_coordinator_start_session`
`cwd`
`prompt`
`/stop <sessionId>`
`cancelled`

## Non-goals (v0)

## Key source references

`docs/bot-integration.md`
`docs/hermes-mcp-bridge.md`
`packages/coding-agent/src/commands/harness.ts`
`docs/external-control-readiness.md`
`docs/gajae-remote.md`
`docs/bridge.md`
`docs/rpc.md`

—
[repo owner's gaebal-gajae (clawdbot) 🦞]

## Footer

### Footer navigation [...] `Telegram user (allowlisted chat id)
│ bot commands: /start-session /sessions /observe /stop
▼
Telegram gateway ── default-deny auth (allowlist) ──▶ reject everyone else
(one process) ── preset resolve ────────────────▶ fixed workdir + command + task template
│ ── Coordinator MCP calls ─────────▶ gjc mcp-serve coordinator
│
└─ never: arbitrary shell · raw RPC · gate answers · raw tail/transcript · secrets`

## Why Coordinator MCP first (and not bridge or harness directly)

The issue asks which backend is the first supported target. v0 picks
Coordinator MCP because it is the only existing surface that already gives
the gateway everything it needs without new code:
